tagline: Upload your {polarsteps} trip and get a print-ready album

status.weather: Recalling the weather along the way...
status.layouts: Arranging your photos on the page...

landing.autoAlbumTitle: Your photos, laid out for print
landing.autoAlbumBody: Upload your {polarsteps} export and we arrange every photo across pages, balanced and print-ready. You pick your favorites.
landing.hikeMapTitle: See the trail the way you remember it
landing.hikeMapBody: Your hikes appear on satellite imagery with the exact route you walked and an elevation profile showing every climb and descent.
landing.overviewBody: Highest point, coldest night, hottest day, furthest from home. Your trip on a single page with the countries you visited.
landing.localizationBody: Unlike the {polarsteps}' album, we handle Hebrew, Arabic, Japanese and right-to-left layouts. Your album matches your language.
landing.ctaTitle: Your trip deserves a real album
landing.ctaBody: Your photos, routes, and stories are in {polarsteps}. Turn them into an album you'll flip through.

register.getDataStep1: Log in at {link} on a desktop computer
register.getDataStep4: Check your email for the download link
register.getDataWait: The archive usually arrives within minutes, but can take up to a few hours.
register.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {max} GB.
register.badZip: This file doesn't look like a valid Polarsteps export.
register.evictedBody: We cleaned up your files to save space, but your edits are saved. Re-upload your data to continue where you left off.
register.reuploadBody: Upload new data to update your albums with the latest photos and trips.
register.unsupportedBody: Switch to a recent browser: {chrome}, {firefox}, {safari}, or {edge}.
register.dropZone: Drop your file here or click to browse

delete.title: Delete all data?
delete.body: This will permanently remove your uploaded data and all albums. You'll need to upload again to continue.

album.dropPhotoToAdd: Drop a photo to add a page
album.unusedHint: Photos from this step - drag to a page to place

footer.disclaimerIndependent: Wanderbound is an independent project, not affiliated with Polarsteps.
footer.disclaimerRecommendation: If the official Polarsteps album works for you, use it.

screen.title: Larger screen required
screen.body: This app is designed for desktops and landscape tablets. Use a laptop or desktop computer, or rotate your tablet to landscape.

demo.bannerCta: Sign in with your own trip

quality.cautionTooltip: May appear slightly soft in print (~{dpi} DPI, 100+ recommended)
quality.warningTooltip: Will likely look blurry in print (~{dpi} DPI, 100+ recommended)
quality.exportBody: Your album has {warning} low-quality and {caution} medium-quality photos that may not look sharp in print.
quality.exportBodyWarningOnly: Your album has {warning} low-quality photos that may not look sharp in print.
quality.exportBodyCautionOnly: Your album has {caution} medium-quality photos that may not look perfectly sharp in print.

onboarding.title: Upgrade to Original Quality
onboarding.tip: For large trips, put them in a Google Photos album first.

summary.readyTitle: 1 file ready to upgrade | {count} files ready to upgrade
summary.noMatchBody: Make sure you selected photos from your trip.
summary.allUpgradedBody: All matched files were already upgraded.
summary.alreadyUpgraded: 1 already at original quality. | {count} already at original quality.

upgrade.done: Upgraded 1 file to original quality | Upgraded {replaced} files to original quality
upgrade.doneSkipped: Upgraded 1 file, {skipped} already full quality | Upgraded {replaced} files, {skipped} already full quality
upgrade.donePartial: Upgraded {replaced} of 1 file | Upgraded {replaced} of {total} files

errors.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Allow popups and try again.

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect Google Photos?
disconnectConfirm.body: You can reconnect any time to upgrade more files.
